title: Ice Cube Tray Bottle Ice Stick Trays Bottom Silicone Easy Release Reusable Long Ice Cube with No Spill Removable Lid Ideal for Sports and Water Bottles Jugs Whiskey Cocktail - Blue
features: This ice tray is well made, easy to clean and easy to use, the soft base easily pops the ice lollies out without breaking.
Made from high quality PP and TPR materials, environmentally friendly, non-toxic, odourless, oil and mould resistant, impact resistant, robust and durable. Colour: Blue.
The dimensions of the tray are: 29.5 x 11.5 x 2cm / 11.6 x 4.5 x 0.8inch. It makes 10 popsicles and measures about 9.3 x 1.7 x 1.5cm.
Suitable for home, party, convenience store, bar, etc. Ice cubes are great for water bottles, jugs, and any container with a narrow neck. Tips: Please do not overfill the water!
Packaging: 1pcs long ice cube tray with a lid.
description: Product Description 1pcs long ice cube tray with a lid Specifications: Material: PP and TPR materials Color: Blue Size: 29.5 x 11.5 x 2cm / 11.6 x 4.5 x 0.8inch Features: 1.The hard edges make these easy to fill. The tray has a lid that stops water from spilling out before freezing, and also keeps odors from the freezer out. 2.The slender ice sticks freeze solid faster than other shapes of ice cubes. The soft base makes them easy to pop out, simple twist and slight push to remove the ice cubes. 3.Non-toxic, odourless, harmless to humans, sturdy and durable, the popsicles are perfect for putting in a bottle and taking to work, exercise, cycling, outdoor activities etc. For cooling drinks such as fruit jellies, ice creams, puddings, yoghurts, milkshakes, coffee, etc. Package included: 1pcs long ice cube tray with a lid See More
